message:
test(inference): add property tests for HSMM, robust inference, and compound Poisson (process_triage-aii.24)

15 proptest properties (2000 cases each) covering HsmmAnalyzer
(posterior normalization/non-negativity/finiteness/batch length/state roundtrip),
robust inference (credal width/intersection/hull/tempered bounds/PPC monotonicity/
minimax ordering), and CompoundPoissonAnalyzer (event count/finiteness/evidence/
regime stats).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
